### By Our Hand

Gardener_1 = {
	name = Garth # Canon, AKA: Greenhand
	dynasty = dynn_Gardener
	dna = Gardener_1

	learning = 9

	religion = fg_pan_garth
	culture = first_man

	trait = education_stewardship_4
	trait = greensight
	trait = patient
	trait = zealous
	trait = diligent
	trait = charming

	trait = average_height
	disallow_random_traits = yes

	give_nickname = nick_agot_historical_greenhand

	2.1.1 = {
		birth = yes
		make_trait_inactive = scripted_appearance # changed from 1.1.1 to 2.1.1 because the game doesn't like 1.1.1
		add_character_flag = canon_status_canon
	}
	15.1.1 = {
		trait = lustful
		trait = lifestyle_gardener
		agot_safe_buy_family_man_perk_history_effect = yes
		trait = family_first
	}
	1999.1.1 = { death = yes }
}

		trait = knight

			add_trait = gregarious
			add_trait = honest
		}
	}

	8115.1.1 = { add_spouse = Redwyne_35 } # Olenna Redwyne

			}
		}
	}

			agot_appoint_as_councillor_for_castle_history_effect = {

				POSITION = councillor_castellan
			}
		}
	}
	8135.10.14 = {
		effect = {
			agot_safe_imprison_in_castle_history_effect = {
				CASTLE = title:d_kingsguard
				RELEASE_DATE = 8135.11.1
				TYPE = dungeon
			}

			remove_trait = honest
